insights: The market shows a clear upward trajectory, with the current total (1428) consistently outperforming both the 7-day (1400) and 30-day (1370) moving averages.
Growth is currently driven by high-velocity roles in Data/ML and 'Other' categories, while traditional Software Engineering roles remain stable but stagnant.
Unicorn companies are leading the hiring volume, suggesting that venture-backed startups are more aggressive in talent acquisition than FAANG+ firms at this stage of the cycle.
